title: Consistent Compass
description: Changes the compass texture to match the recovery compass!
body:
<center>
  
![Consistent Compass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2I3wdYsN/images/8c47133033cbbd5b1675bfa94ba24fad071c3252.png)
## Consistent Compass
**By Lobby**

Consistent Compass is a simple drag-and-drop resource pack that changes the compass texture to match the style of the recovery compass.

Also check out [Consistent Recovery Compass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/recoverycompass), which does the complete opposite of this resource pack, instead changing the recovery compass texture to match the style of the compass!
